texto: Trust isn’t about having a spotless record and finding someone else who does. It’s about finding someone good-hearted enough not to hurt you on purpose, and knowing you’ll recover and carry on when pain inevitably comes.
explicacao: Citação de Carolyn Hax sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Trust isn’t about having a spotless record and finding someone else who does. It’s about finding …” articula reflexao, trust, about em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
